summary.intro: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with over 5 years of hands-on experience designing and delivering scalable, reliable, and production-ready web systems.
summary.specialization: I work across the full stack, with a strong focus on system architecture, backend reliability, and long-term maintainability. My core stack includes React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB, complemented by solid experience in CI/CD automation, containerized deployments, and real-time systems.

experience.list1: Designing and operating fault-tolerant backend systems behind Nginx with Docker-based deployments
experience.list2: Building maintainable frontend architectures with React and modern UI libraries
experience.list3: Implementing secure payment flows and automated document generation
experience.list4: Architecting service-oriented and event-driven systems using Redis and RabbitMQ
experience.list5: Ensuring code quality and system stability through unit, integration testing, and performance optimization

summary.focus: I focus on clean architecture, predictable system behavior, and engineering solutions that scale with both product and team growth.

details: Delivered production-grade web platforms under NDA, focusing on scalability, reliability, and clean architecture
Designed and implemented real-time dashboards using React, Redux Toolkit, and Socket.io for monitoring and visualization
Built and operated Node.js backend services with containerized deployments (Docker) behind Nginx reverse proxy and load balancing
Implemented CI/CD automation with Jenkins, including rollback and recovery strategies to improve release safety
Integrated payment flows (Stripe, PayPal) and automated PDF document generation using webhooks and Puppeteer
Improved code quality through unit and integration testing (Jest, SuperTest) and performance optimizations (asset optimization, lazy loading)
Designed and developed a custom CRM platform with a focus on scalability and maintainable architecture using Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and React
Built reusable and consistent UI components with Ant Design and Bootstrap to support rapid feature development
Implemented RESTful APIs with optimized data indexing and migration strategies to support growing datasets
Established reliable unit and integration testing workflows using Jest and SuperTest
Managed Docker-based CI/CD deployments to ensure stable and repeatable releases
Developed internal administrative dashboards using React, Express.js, and MongoDB
Implemented real-time functionality with Socket.io to support live data updates
Built and maintained RESTful API services and backend business logic with Node.js
Refactored legacy frontend codebases using modern React architecture and best practices
Developed responsive and accessible user interfaces with Material-UI, SCSS, and EJS
Ensured cross-browser compatibility and compliance with accessibility standards
Collaborated closely with backend developers to integrate APIs and ensure data consistency
Delivered structured training programs covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React for aspiring developers
Designed hands-on learning projects and provided individual mentorship to support junior developers’ growth
